tools.name: duration_of_daily_spend
tools.description: How long a given wealth would last if a fixed amount were spent every day. Returns value/unit plus ready-made phrase, sentence, and for-scale context.

tools.name: height_of_money_stack
tools.description: How high a given wealth would stack in physical money. Returns value/unit plus ready-made phrase, sentence, and for-scale context.

tools.name: number_of_items
tools.description: How many of a given item a wealth could buy or pay off (coffees to superyachts). Returns value/type plus ready-made phrase, sentence, and for-scale context.

tools.name: growth_of_compound_interest
tools.description: How much a wealth grows from compound interest alone over a period. Returns value/unit plus ready-made phrase, sentence, and for-scale context.

tools.name: comparison
tools.description: Complete "them vs. you" comparison: runs one expression for both wealths and returns both results plus the ratio between them. Ideal for questions like "how does my net worth compare to a billionaire's?"
